CVE-2020-27818.title: A flaw was found in the check_chunk_name() function of pngcheck-2 ...
CVE-2020-27818.summary: A flaw was found in the check_chunk_name() function of pngcheck-2.4.0. An attacker able to pass a malicious file to be processed by pngcheck could cause a temporary denial of service, posing a low risk to application availability.

CVE-2020-35511.summary: A global buffer overflow was discovered in pngcheck function in pngcheck-2.4.0(5 patches applied) via a crafted png file.
